chronology_provenance_text: The older specimen, which we refer to hereafter as HXH, was found at the Early Neolithic site of Herxheim and is dated to 5,223-5,040 cal. BCE. The younger specimen, CTC, was found in Cherry Tree Cave and corresponds to the End Neolithic period in Central Europe.
